agents.name: Historical Data Scraper
agents.task: Fetching all Polymarket events + price histories
details: Step 1: Downloading event metadata from Gamma API
Step 2: For each event, fetch minute-by-minute prices from CLOB API
Output: JSON files → transform to Parquet for DuckDB
agents.thinking: This is the foundation. Without real historical data, all backtests are fiction. Taking the time to do this RIGHT.
